message:
🐛 Fix ActionMenu crash and terminal black screen (#40)

- Remove as="h3" from ActionList.GroupHeading inside ActionMenu
  (Primer invariant violation crashed React when opening menus)
- Add font preloading gate to prevent xterm rendering before
  MesloLGS NF font is loaded
- Add display:flex to TerminalView wrapper for proper height
- Add font preload hint in index.html
- Make attach/add button icons more prominent with color

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@
     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
     <meta name="theme-color" content="#0d1117" />
     <title>Copilot Remote</title>
+    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/MesloLGS-NF-Regular.ttf" as="font" type="font/ttf" crossorigin />
     <style>
       html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #1c2128; color: #adbac7; }
     </style>
